Source: Einstein GenAI API References
URL: https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/einstein/genai/references
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Einstein GenAI / Agentforce API References

## Available APIs
- Agent API — Connected app + token-based communication with AI agents; send messages via topics and actions
- Models API — Apex classes and REST endpoints for LLM connections (both Apex and REST reference docs available)
- Testing API — Combines Metadata API and Connect API for building and running agent tests
- Citations API — Apex classes for programmatic citation support in agent responses

## SDKs
- Agentforce Python SDK — Programmatic agent creation, management, and deployment via Metadata API
- Agentforce Mobile SDK — Native iOS and Android integration for embedding agent interactions in mobile apps
- Agent Script — Domain-specific language combining natural language instructions with programmatic expressions for agent workflows and business rules
- Agentforce DX — Pro-code tools for creating and testing agents outside Builder UI

## Additional Features
- Lightning Types — Custom types that improve UI for agent actions, effective for complex inputs and outputs
- Metadata and Tooling APIs — Agentforce functionality accessible through standard Salesforce APIs

## Developer Guides Referenced
- Agentforce Developer Guide
- Agent API Developer Guide
- Models API Developer Guide
